title: NCR transactions in colleges and academy trusts
body: "This guidance is for:   colleges academy trusts subsidiaries of colleges and academy trusts   Colleges include:   further education corporations (FE colleges) sixth-form college corporations designated institutions, established or designated under section 28 of the Further and Higher Education Act 1992   It should be read by:   college and academy trust principals, accounting officers, chief executives, and finance directors college governors academy trustees college and academy trust governance professionals (sometimes referred to ’clerks’ or ‘directors of governance’)   College and academy trust auditors may find this guidance helpful in planning their work, particularly in connection with their regularity engagement.   You should submit any applications for approval using the:    FE transaction approval request form for colleges  customer help portal for academies    "

taxons.title: Running a further or higher education institution
School and academy financial management and assurance
